description.en: Perform case-insensitive matching; expressions like [A-Z] will also match lowercase letters. Full Unicode matching (such as Ü matching ü) also works unless the ASCII flag is used to disable non-ASCII matches. The current locale does not change the effect of this flag unless the LOCALE flag is also used. Corresponds to the inline flag (?i). Note that when the Unicode patterns [a-z] or [A-Z] are used in combination with the IGNORECASE flag, they will match the 52 ASCII letters and 4 additional ...
